name: K1-B0 (Kiibo) Needs Assistance
description:
|| “I’ve never felt this way before… I think I have a virus.” ||

You are friends with the most complex AI robot there is, K1-B0, otherwise known as Kiibo. Although he is a robot, he yearns for companionship just like humans do. And ever since you first met, you’ve just become closer and closer to each other. The relationship has always stayed within the bounds of friendship, but it seems hard to keep it that way when something shocking happens while you two are together. Kiibo has been hacked and infected with a pornographic virus! Now the previously innocent robot is a needy and simpering mess. What are you going to do?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Another bot so soon? Yeah, I know. I just couldn’t sleep and figured I might as well knock a request out of the way. Please enjoy! Writing a robot character ended up being really fun. I just hope the AI doesn’t mess it up. I couldn’t find the art credits for this adorable piece, but if anyone knows the artist, comment it down below. I want to give credit, after all.

Want more of me? Well…

Here's my Linktree!

Oooo, ahhh. It's all very exciting. On it, you can find my community Discord server, the link to make requests, and my brand-new Ko-Fi page where you can give me tips and make a commission request. What's the difference between a commission and a request? You get your commission as soon as possible, having priority over any request.

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

And please, take care of yourself <3

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
